persistence_vault.name: IndexedDB_Core
persistence_vault.description: Production-ready IndexedDB wrapper with CRUD, export/import, and auto-ID generation

migration_engine.name: Text_Parser_Base
migration_engine.description: Multi-format backup/restore pipeline (JSON, HTML, CSV, Markdown)

rescue_importer.name: Universal_ReadLater_Parser
rescue_importer.description: Universal HTML/JSON parser for Read-it-Later service imports. Handles Pocket, Instapaper, and generic bookmark exports. Includes wizard UI for guided import flow.

performance_brick.name: Native_Discard_Logic
performance_brick.description: Tab suspension and memory optimization for Chrome extensions

tiered_unlock.name: Pay_Once_Unlock
tiered_unlock.description: License key validation and tier management for freemium extensions

privacy_shield.name: Data_Redactor
privacy_shield.description: PII detection and data sanitization for privacy-first applications

password_parser.name: Password_Rescue_Parser
password_parser.description: High-security password manager import parser. Supports Dashlane CSV/JSON, LastPass CSV, 1Password CSV with auto-detection. Includes Migration Audit (weak/reused password detection) and security scoring.

crypto_vault.name: Web_Crypto_Vault
crypto_vault.description: 100% client-side encryption layer using Web Crypto API. AES-256-GCM encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation (600k iterations). Zero server dependency.
